svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="五层自愈架构总览" id="overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-194" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="820" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="线上智能监控与缺陷自愈 · 五层架构" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="600" x="280" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="① 指标定义 · SLI / SLO / 错误预算" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="600" x="280" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1a" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontColor=#475569;" value="可用性 · 延迟 · 业务异常 · 资源水位
触发条件绑在错误预算消耗速率（> 3x 均值）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="560" x="300" y="86" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="② 监控采集 · 让 AI 能看到系统" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="600" x="280" y="166" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2a" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontColor=#475569;" value="结构化日志（JSON + RequestId 全链路）
Prometheus 指标 + CLI 查询接口（供 AI 消费）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="560" x="300" y="194" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="③ 告警 + AI 调度 · 从通知人到触发 AI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="98" width="600" x="280" y="274" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3a" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="告警 webhook → 去重 → 环境/代码分流
AI 调度器：捞日志、捞指标、bot 拉代码、LLM 诊断
三路分流：可自动修 / 风险高 / 不可修" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="560" x="300" y="302" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="④ 自动修复 + 验证 · 从改代码到提 PR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="98" width="600" x="280" y="402" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4a" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="创建 fix 分支 → 修代码 → commit
三层验证：静态检查 → 全量测试 → AI 自我 review
全过 → 提 PR 到 dev（不自动合并，等人 review）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="560" x="300" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="⑤ 通知 + 记录 + Changelog · 让人知道机器做了什么" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="98" width="600" x="280" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5a" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontColor=#475569;" value="飞书 / 邮件通知（按紧急度分流）
结构化修复记录 → 监控面板（成功率、MTTR、分布）
Changelog 自动追加，按月汇总进版本发布说明" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="560" x="300" y="558" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="L1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="L2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e23" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="L3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e34" edge="1" parent="1" source="L3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="L4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e45" edge="1" parent="1" source="L4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="L5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="feedback" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#2563eb;fontStyle=2;" value="运营数据回流
成功率 / MTTR / 分布
→ 新的监控指标" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="920" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fb" edge="1" parent="1" source="L5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1000" y="579" /> <mxPoint x="1000" y="97" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legacy" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;fontSize=11;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontStyle=2;" value="传统监控止于此
（告警 → 等人处理）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="180" x="80" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_legacy" edge="1" parent="1" source="legacy" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;endArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="L3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontColor=#64748b;fontStyle=2;" value="闭环核心：① → ⑤ → ①。自愈体系的运营数据本身就是新的监控指标，需要被度量。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="760" x="200" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 500px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 线上智能监控与缺陷自愈 · 五层架构

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 59px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;

div.div: ① 指标定义 · SLI / SLO / 错误预算

div.div:
可用性 · 延迟 · 业务异常 · 资源水位

div.div: ③ 告警 + AI 调度 · 从通知人到触发 AI

div.div:
告警 webhook → 去重 → 环境/代码分流
AI 调度器：捞日志、捞指标、bot 拉代码、LLM 诊断
三路分流：可自动修 / 风险高 / 不可修

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 403px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ④ 自动修复 + 验证 · 从改代码到提 PR

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 423px; margin-left: 500px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
创建 fix 分支 → 修代码 → commit
三层验证：静态检查 → 全量测试 → AI 自我 review
全过 → 提 PR 到 dev（不自动合并，等人 review）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 531px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ⑤ 通知 + 记录 + Changelog · 让人知道机器做了什么

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 551px; margin-left: 500px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #475569;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#475569, #9ba7b8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
飞书 / 邮件通知（按紧急度分流）
结构化修复记录 → 监控面板（成功率、MTTR、分布）
Changelog 自动追加，按月汇总进版本发布说明

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 313px; margin-left: 930px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #2563eb;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#2563eb, #699eff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
运营数据回流
成功率 / MTTR / 分布
→ 新的监控指标

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-end; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 273px; margin-left: 178px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: right; color: #94a3b8;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#94a3b8, #576476); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
传统监控止于此
（告警 → 等人处理）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 653px; margin-left: 500px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #64748b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#64748b, #7e8c9f); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 闭环核心：① → ⑤ → ①。自愈体系的运营数据本身就是新的监控指标，需要被度量。
